method: Routed drive time (OSRM, OpenStreetMap England road network, car profile). Origin = LSOA polygon centroid; candidates and file schema unchanged from the estimated build: each LSOA stores its nearest 4 candidate sites as [siteIdx, minutes]. Hypothetical added sites in the app are still scored with the estimation model until routed on demand. Candidate destinations are General Acute hospital sites only, including cross-border sites; community hospitals are not acute destinations.
